'Bone on bone' language specifically targets severe cases who've been told surgery is only option
extraction_notes.modern_adaptation_potential: Medium - the B2G1 offer structure is timeless, but format is print-specific
extraction_notes.key_insight: The offer IS the ad - copy is minimal because the deal does the heavy lifting. Classic late-stage sophistication where offer innovation beats copy innovation.
extraction_notes.source_note: File contained I Love Lucy movie promotional content from same Parade issue - extraction focused on MagniLife ad only
